prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年湖南大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为：2021年约1773名、2022年约1775名、2023年约2435名、2024年约1592名、2025年约4963名。2021–202 4年位次基本在1500–2500区间波动，但2025年出现异常大幅后移至4963名，主要原因是2025年新增了不限选科的专业组（80），该组录取位次大幅拉低了校线。剔除该组后，2025 年其他专业组最低位次约1935名，与历史区间基本吻合；该校在海南省2021–2025年招生计划分别为83人、84人、84人、89人、89人，总体呈小幅扩招趋势，近 两年稳定在89人。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校 ，软科中国大学排名2026年第31名，近年排名稳定在29–32名区间，属于中坚985层次；抖音学校热度总排名第16位（高热），综合热度310万，在985高校中处于 中上水平，短视频曝光活跃。2026年声誉文件中未出现湖南大学相关负面舆情，学校整体声誉平稳。历史投档异常记录中未见湖南大学断档信号；第五轮学科评 估中，湖南大学拥有化学A、机械工程A、工商管理A、土木工程A-、计算机科学与技术A-、电气工程A-、应用经济学A-、控制科学与工程A-等8个A类学科，工科与管理学科实力均 衡，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化持续高热推荐；法学、金融/财经/经济呈分化观望；土木建筑呈分化观望；新闻传播、生化环材明显劝退。海南省考生总数从2021年52977人持续增长至2025年67408人，2026年预估约78000人（较2025年增长约15.7%），竞争明显加 剧。海南本科批2021–2025年稳定在466–483分区间，2025年为480分，波动不大；湖南大学位于湖南省长沙市，与海南省无特殊地域偏好。该校在 海南招生计划约89人，占其全国总招生计划的比例较小（约1%左右），属于跨省常规招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 。预测最低录取位次约4763名，位次区间4263–5263名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约4763名，区间4263–5263名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（4263名以内）可重点冲刺一档的 计算机科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化等热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限（5263名附近）应以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中社会热度较高的专业。注意生化环材类、新闻传播类 专业社会热度偏低，报考时需结合个人兴趣与就业规划综合考量。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hunan University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were: approximately 1773 in 2021, 1775 in 2022, 2435 in 2023, 1592 in 2024, and 4963 in 2025. Rankings fluctuated within the 1500–2500 range from 2021 to 2024, but in 2025, there was an abnormal significant drop to 4963, mainly due to the addition of a new subject-restriction-free major group (80) in 2025, whose admission ranking significantly lowered the school's cutoff. Excluding this group, the minimum ranking for other major groups in 2025 was approximately 1935, which is consistent with the historical range. The university's enrollment plans in Hainan Province from 2021 to 2025 were 83, 84, 84, 89, and 89 students respectively, showing a slight expansion trend, stabilizing at 89 in the last two years.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranked 31st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with recent rankings stable in the 29–32 range, placing it among the mid-tier 985 universities. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranking is 16th (high popularity), with a comprehensive popularity of 3.1 million, indicating an above-average level among 985 universities and active short video exposure. In the 2026 reputation documents, no negative public opinion related to Hunan University was found, and the overall reputation remains stable. Historical admission anomaly records show no signs of a cutoff drop for Hunan University. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hunan University has 8 A-level disciplines: Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Civil Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Applied Economics A-, and Control Science and Engineering A-, with balanced strength in engineering and management, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended; Law, Finance/Banking/Economics show differentiation and wait-and-see; Civil Engineering and Architecture show differentiation and wait-and-see; Journalism and Communication, Biology/Chemistry/Environment/Materials are clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates in Hainan Province has grown from 52,977 in 2021 to 67,408 in 2025, with an estimated 78,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 15.7% from 2025), significantly intensifying competition. The Hainan undergraduate batch cutoff has been stable in the 466–483 range from 2021 to 2025, with 480 in 2025, showing little fluctuation. Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, with no special regional preference for Hainan Province. Its enrollment plan in Hainan is about 89 students, accounting for a small proportion (about 1%) of its total national enrollment, which is a routine cross-provincial enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 4763, with a ranking range of 4263–5263.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 4763, with a range of 4263–5263. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 4263), focus on aiming for popular engineering majors in Tier 1 such as Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation. For rankings near the upper limit (around 5263), prioritize Tier 3 majors while considering Tier 2 majors with higher social popularity. Note that majors in Biology/Chemistry/Environment/Materials and Journalism/Communication have lower social popularity, so candidates should consider personal interests and career plans comprehensively when applying.
